name: Bomb Rush Cyberfunk
description: Bomb Rush Cyberfunk is 1 second per second of advanced funkstyle.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Logic
options.description: Choose the logic used by the randomizer.

options.label: Skip Dreams
options.description: Skips the dream sequences at the end of each chapter.

options.label: Skip Statue Hands
options.description: Skips spraying the lion statue hands after the dream in Chapter 5.

options.label: Total Rep
options.description: Change the total amount of REP in your world.

options.label: Extra Rep Required
options.description: Changes the final boss to require 1000 REP instead of 960 REP to start.

options.label: Starting Movestyle
options.description: Choose which movestyle to start with.

options.label: Limited Graffiti
options.description: Each graffiti design can only be used a limited number of times before being removed from your inventory.

options.label: Small Graffiti Uses
options.description: Choose if small graffiti should be separate, meaning that you will need to switch characters every time you run out, or combined, meaning that unlocking new characters will add 5 uses that any character can use.

options.label: Skip Polo Photos
options.description: Skip taking pictures of Polo for items.

options.label: Dont Save Photos
options.description: Photos taken with the Camera app will not be saved.

options.label: Score Difficulty
options.description: Alters the score required to win score challenges and crew battles.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.
